judgment.summary: The company is experiencing explosive growth and high profitability with a very attractive forward valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 12.20 beat the 9.16 estimate by 33.2%, with the next earnings date on 2026-06-24.
positives: Forward P/E of 7.62 and PEG ratio of 0.26 suggest an attractive valuation relative to growth.
Revenue growth of 196.3% and quarterly earnings growth of 770.8% show massive expansion.
High profitability is evidenced by a 41.5% profit margin and 39.8% return on equity.
Strong liquidity is supported by $14.59B in cash and a current ratio of 2.90.
negatives: Mean analyst price target of $573.90 is significantly lower than the current spot price of $776.01.
Beta of 1.92 indicates high stock volatility.
Price/Book of 12.08 reflects a high premium relative to book value.

news.paragraph: Micron is seeing significant momentum driven by high AI memory demand and long-term HBM contracts. Recent news highlights record results and a major price target reset from Bank of America following a recent surge in the stock. Traders should also weigh the positive sentiment in the broader semiconductor sector following strong earnings and outlooks from industry peers.
